mano_cua.result_summary: Coracle是Nostr社交客户端，需要Nostr私钥(nsec)登录才能访问发布/上传功能。mano-cua无法完成登录（无可用Nostr账户），因此无法测试文件上传功能。15min硬超时终止
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The Coracle app requires Nostr network authentication (nsec key) to access compose/upload features. Without login, only read-only feed is visible. Attempted to find compose button and login flow but could not proceed without a valid Nostr key.
